title: Iseilema prostratum
taxonomy: Iseilema prostratum is classified under the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. This species belongs to the genus Iseilema, which is a group of grasses native to tropical and subtropical regions. Iseilema prostratum is further classified into the order Poales, a group of monocotyledonous flowering plants that include various types of grasses and sedges. Within the family Poaceae, Iseilema prostratum is part of the subfamily Chloridoideae, which consists of various grasses and grass-like plants. The full classification of Iseilema prostratum can be represented as: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Magnoliophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Poales, Family: Poaceae, Genus: Iseilema, Species: I. prostratum.
